title: DeleteUserIdentityResponseContent
description: An array of objects with information about the user's identities.

connection.description: The name of the connection for the identity.

user_id.description: The unique identifier for the user for the identity.

isSocial.description: true if the identity provider is a social provider, falses otherwise

access_token.description: IDP access token returned only if scope read:user_idp_tokens is defined

access_token_secret.description: IDP access token secret returned only if scope read:user_idp_tokens is defined.

refresh_token.description: IDP refresh token returned only if scope read:user_idp_tokens is defined.
